reviews.review_description: This game has a lot of potential there is alot off stuff to do considering the game is still in beta (I think) but I think that there are still alot of things that can be added but the locomotion works fine so there’s still alot of stuff that can be added but the game works great 5 stars

reviews.review_title: It's a realy fun game 5 stars
reviews.review_description: It's a real fun game with more people

reviews.review_title: This one of the best GTAG fan games.
reviews.review_description:
It is a really good game but they need to revamp the player model the hands are small and right arm dissabears sometimes. 
Hope y'all enjoy!

reviews.review_title: THIS IS THE BEST FAN GAME
reviews.review_description: This game has a lot and its still on the early stages a lot of own made cosmetics and low gravoty saber arena 10/10🔥
